articles.title: The Brooklyn Bridge: A Symbol of New York City
sentences: There is a famous bridge in New York City.
It is called the Brooklyn Bridge.
Many people walk across it every day.
The bridge is very old and strong.
It connects two parts of the city.

articles.title: The U.S. Bullion Depository at Fort Knox Holds America’s Gold
sentences: There is a special place in America.
It is called Fort Knox.
Many gold bars are there.
The building is very strong.
Nobody can go inside.

articles.title: Japanese Barber, Age 108, Wins Guinness World Record
sentences: There is a barber in Japan.
He is 108 years old.
He still cuts hair every day.
He has a Guinness World Record.
He is very happy at work.

articles.title: American Steve Fossett Set Flying and Sailing Records
sentences: Steve Fossett was an American adventurer.
He set many world records.
He flew around the world in a balloon.
He also sailed across the ocean.
He was very brave and strong.

articles.title: Buckminster Fuller: Designer and Thinker
sentences: Buckminster Fuller was a famous American.
He was a designer and a thinker.
He created many interesting things.
He liked to solve big problems.
People still learn from his ideas today.
